verses.geez: ንፍኁ፡ ቀርነ፡ በጽዩን፡ ወስብኩ፡ በደብረ፡ መቅደስየ፡ ወይደንግፁ፡ ኲሎሙ፡ እለ፡ ይነብሩ፡ ውስተ፡ ምድር፡ እስመ፡ በጽሐት፡ ዕለተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወአልጸቀት።

translations.lxx: Sound the trumpet in Sion, make a proclamation in my holy mountain, and let all the inhabitants of the land be confounded: for the day of the Lord is near;
translations.kjv: Blow ye the trumpet in Zion, and sound an alarm in my holy mountain: let all the inhabitants of the land tremble: for the day of the LORD cometh, for it is nigh at hand;

verses.geez: ዕለተ፡ ጽልመት፡ ወዐውሎ፡ ዕለተ፡ ደመና፡ ወጊሜ፡ ከመ፡ ጎሕ፡ ይዘረዉ፡ ሕዝብ፡ ዙኅ፡ ውስተ፡ አድባር፡ ወጽኑዕ፡ ዘኢኮነ፡ ካማሁ፡ እምፍጥት፡ ዓም፡ ወኢይደግም፡ እንከ፡ እምድኀሬሁ፡ እስከ፡ ዓመተ፡ ትውልደ፡ ትልድ።

translations.lxx: for a day of darkness and gloominess is near, a day of cloud and mist: a numerous and strong people shall be spread upon the mountains as the morning; there has not been from the beginning one like it, and after it there shall not be again even to the years of many generations.
translations.kjv: A day of darkness and of gloominess, a day of clouds and of thick darkness, as the morning spread upon the mountains: a great people and a strong; there hath not been ever the like, neither shall be any more after it, even to the years of many generations.

verses.geez: ፈብጽምሂ፡ እሳት፡ ይበልዕ፡ ወበከዋላሂ፡ ያውዒ፡ ነበልባል። ከመ፡ ገነተ፡ ትፍሥሕት፡ ምድር፡ ቀዳሚሁ፡ ወይገብዕ፡ ድኀሬሁ፡ ከመ፡ በድወ፡ ሐሩር፡ ወአልቦ፡ ዘያመስጥ፡ እምኔሁ።

translations.lxx: Before them is a consuming fire, and behind them is a flame kindled: the land before them is as a paradise of delight, and behind them a desolate plain: and there shall none of them escape.
translations.kjv: A fire devoureth before them; and behind them a flame burneth: the land is as the garden of Eden before them, and behind them a desolate wilderness; yea, and nothing shall escape them.

verses.geez: ከመ፡ ገጸ፡ ፈረስ፡ ገጾሙ፡ ወረዋጽያን፡ ከመ፡ አፍራስ።

translations.lxx: Their appearance is as the appearance of horses; and as horsemen, so shall they pursue.
translations.kjv: The appearance of them is as the appearance of horses; and as horsemen, so shall they run.

verses.geez: ወከመ፡ ድምፅ፡ ሠረገላ፡ ውስተ፡ አርእስተ፡ አድባር፡ ይሜርዱ፡ ወከመ፤ደምፀ፡ ነበልባ፡ እንተ፡ ትበልዕ፡ ብርዐ፡ ወከመ፡ ሠራዊት፡ ብዙኃን፡ ዋጽኑዓን፡ እለ፡ ይታቃተሉ፡ ውስተ፡ መራድ።

translations.lxx: As the sound of chariots on the tops of mountains shall they leap, and as the sound of a flame of fire devouring stubble, and as a numerous and strong people setting themselves in array for battle.
translations.kjv: Like the noise of chariots on the tops of mountains shall they leap, like the noise of a flame of fire that devoureth the stubble, as a strong people set in battle array.

verses.geez: ወይትቀጠቀጡ፡ አሕዛብ፡ እምቅድመ፡ ገጹ፡ ወይከውን፡ ገጸ፡ ወይከውን፡ ገጸ፡ ኲሎሙ፡ ከመ፡ ላሽበ፡ መቅጹት።

translations.lxx: Before them shall the people be crushed: every face shall be as the blackness of a caldron.
translations.kjv: Before their face the people shall be much pained: all faces shall gather blackness.

verses.geez: ወይረውጹ፡ ከመ፡ መስተቃላን፡ ዋካማ፡ ዕደው፡ ተባዕያን፡ የዐርጉ፡ አረፍተ፡ ወኲሎሙ፡ እንከ፡ የሐውሩ፡ በፍኖቶሙ፡ ወኢይትገሐሱ፡ እምፍኖቶሙ።

translations.lxx: As warriors shall they run, and as men of war shall they mount on the walls; and each shall move in his right path, and they shall not turn aside from their tracks:
translations.kjv: They shall run like mighty men; they shall climb the wall like men of war; and they shall march every one on his ways, and they shall not break their ranks:

verses.geez: ወኢይትራኀቁ፡ አሐዱ፡ እምካኡ፡ ጽውራኒሆሙ፡ ንዋየ፡ ሐቅሎሙ፡ ይረውጹ፡ ዋያኀልቁ፡ በሐዖሙ።

translations.lxx: and not one shall stand aloof from his brother: they shall go on weighed down with their arms, and they fall upon their weapons, yet shall they in no wise be destroyed.
translations.kjv: Neither shall one thrust another; they shall walk every one in his path: and when they fall upon the sword, they shall not be wounded.

verses.geez: ወያስተጋብኡ፡ አህጉረ፡ ወይረውጹ፡ ዲበ፡ አረፍት፡ ወየዐርጉ፡ ውስተ፡ አብያ፡ ወይበውኡ፡ እንተ፡ መሳክው፡ ከመ፡ ሰረቅት።

translations.lxx: They shall seize upon the city, and run upon the walls, and go up upon the houses, and enter in through the windows as thieves.
translations.kjv: They shall run to and fro in the city; they shall run upon the wall, they shall climb up upon the houses; they shall enter in at the windows like a thief.

verses.geez: ወትደነግፅ፡ ምድር፡ እምቅድመ፡ ገጾሙ፡ ወታድለቀልቅ፡ ሰማይ፡ ወትጸልም፡ ፀሐይ፡ ወወርኀ፡ ወትጠፍእ፡ ብርሃኖሙ፡ ለከመዋክብት።

translations.lxx: Before them the earth shall be confounded, and the sky shall be shaken: the sun and the moon shall be darkened, and the stars shall withdraw their light.
translations.kjv: The earth shall quake before them; the heavens shall tremble: the sun and the moon shall be dark, and the stars shall withdraw their shining:

verses.geez: ወይሁብ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ቃሎ፡ ቅድመ፡ ገጸ፡ ኀይሉ፡ እስመ፡ ብዙኀ፡ ፈድፋደ፡ ትዕይንቱ፡ ወጽኑዑ፡ ምግባረ፡ ቃሉ፡ እስመ፡ ዓባይ፡ እለተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወግርመት፡ ወታስተርኢ፡ ፈድፋደ፡ ወምንት፡ መጠና፡ መኑ፡ ይክላ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord shall utter his voice before his host: for his camp is very great: for the execution of his words is mighty: for the day of the Lord is great, very glorious, and who shall be able to resist it?
translations.kjv: And the LORD shall utter his voice before his army: for his camp is very great: for he is strong that executeth his word: for the day of the LORD is great and very terrible; and who can abide it?

verses.geez: ይእዜኒ፡ ይቤ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክ፡ ተመየጡ፡ ኀቤየ፡ በኲሉ፡ ልብክሙ፡ በጾም፡ ወበላሕ፡ ወበብካይ።

translations.lxx: Now therefore, saith the Lord your God, turn to me with all your heart, and with fasting, and with weeping, and with lamentation:
translations.kjv: Therefore also now, saith the LORD, turn ye even to me with all your heart, and with fasting, and with weeping, and with mourning:

verses.geez: ወሥጥጡ፡ ልበክሙ፡ ወአኮ፡ አልባሲክሙ፡ ወተመየጡ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክክሙ፡ እስመ፡ መሐሪ፡ ወመስተሣህል፡ ውእቱ፡ ርኁቀ፡ መዐት፡ ወብዙኀ፡ ምሕረት፡ ወይኔስሕ፡ በእንተ፡ እኪት።

translations.lxx: and rend your hearts, and not your garments, and turn to the Lord your God: for he is merciful and compassionate, long-suffering, and plenteous in mercy, and repents of evils.
translations.kjv: And rend your heart, and not your garments, and turn unto the LORD your God: for he is gracious and merciful, slow to anger, and of great kindness, and repenteth him of the evil.

verses.geez: መኑ፡ የአምር፡ እመ፡ ይትመየጥ፡ ወይኔስሕ፡ ወያተርፍ፡ ድኀሬሁ፡ በረከተ፡ ወመሥዋዕተ፡ ወሞጻሕተ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክነ።

translations.lxx: Who knows if he will return, and repent, and leave a blessing behind him, even a meat-offering and a drink-offering to the Lord your God?
translations.kjv: Who knoweth if he will return and repent, and leave a blessing behind him; even a meat offering and a drink offering unto the LORD your God?

verses.geez: ንፍኁ፡ ቀርነ፡ በጽዩን፡ ቀድሱ፡ ጾመ፡ ወስበኩ፡ ምህልላ።

translations.lxx: Sound the trumpet in Sion, sanctify a fast, proclaim a solemn service:
translations.kjv: Blow the trumpet in Zion, sanctify a fast, call a solemn assembly:

verses.geez: አስተብኡ፡ ሕዝበ፡ ዋቃድሱ፡ ማኀበረክሙ፡ ኀርዩ፡ ሊቃውነተ፡ አስተጋብኡ፡ ሕፃናተ፡ እለ፡ ይጠብዉ፡ ጥበ፡ ይፃእ፡ መርዓዊ፡ እምጽርሑ፡ ወመርዓት፡ እመንጦላዕታ።

translations.lxx: gather the people, sanctify the congregation, assemble the elders, gather the infants at the breast: let the bridegroom go forth of his chamber, and the bride out of her closet.
translations.kjv: Gather the people, sanctify the congregation, assemble the elders, gather the children, and those that suck the breasts: let the bridegroom go forth of his chamber, and the bride out of her closet.

verses.geez: ወይብክከየ፡ ካህነት፡ እ፡ ላይሠውዑ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ በማእከለ፡ አቅርንተ፡ መስዋዕ፡ ወይበሉ፡ መሐክ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ሕዝበከ፡ ወኢታኀስር፡ ርስተከ፡ ከመ፡ ኢይንፅኅዎሙ፡ አሕዛብ፡ ዋካማ፡ ኢይበሉ፡ አሕዛብ፡ አይቴ፡ ውእቱ፡ አምላኮሙ።

translations.lxx: Between the porch and the altar let the priests that minister to the Lord weep, and say, Spare thy people, O Lord, and give not thine heritage to reproach, that the heathen should rule over them, lest they should say among the heathen, Where is their God?
translations.kjv: Let the priests, the ministers of the LORD, weep between the porch and the altar, and let them say, Spare thy people, O LORD, and give not thine heritage to reproach, that the heathen should rule over them: wherefore should they say among the people, Where is their God?

verses.geez: ወቀንአ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ለምድሩ፡ ወመሐኮሙ፡ ለሕዝቡ።

translations.lxx: But the Lord was jealous of his land, and spared his people.
translations.kjv: Then will the LORD be jealous for his land, and pity his people.

verses.geez: ወተሠጥዎሙ፡ እግዚብሔር፡ ወይቤሎሙ፡ ለሕዝቡ፡ ናሁ፡ እነ፡ እፌኑ፡ ለክሙ፡ እክለ፡ ወወይነ፡ ወዘይተ፡ ወትጸግቡ፡ ወኢይሬስየክሙ፡ ጽዕለተ፡ ለአህዛብ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord answered and said to his people, Behold, I will send you corn, and wine, and oil, and ye shall be satisfied with them: and I will no longer make you a reproach among the Gentiles.
translations.kjv: Yea, the LORD will answer and say unto his people, Behold, I will send you corn, and wine, and oil, and ye shall be satisfied therewith: and I will no more make you a reproach among the heathen:

verses.geez: ወእሰድዶሙ፡ እምኔክሙ፡ ለእለ፡ መንገለ፡ ደብብ፡ ወእሰድዶሙ፡ ውስተ፡ ምድር፡ በድው፡ ወአጠፍኦሙ፡ ፍጽሞሙ፡ ውስተ፡ ቀዳሚት፡ ባሕር፡ ወየዐርግ፡ ጺአቱ፡ ወየዐርግ፡ ንስሐቱ፡ እስመ፡ አዕበየ፡ ምግባሮ።

translations.lxx: And I will chase away from you the northern adversary, and will drive him away into a dry land, and I will sink his face in the former sea, and his back parts in the latter sea, and his ill savour shall come up, and his stink shall come up, because he has wrought great things.
translations.kjv: But I will remove far off from you the northern army, and will drive him into a land barren and desolate, with his face toward the east sea, and his hinder part toward the utmost sea, and his stink shall come up, and his ill savour shall come up, because he hath done great things.

verses.geez: ተአመኒ፡ ምድር፡ ወተፈሥሒ፡ ወተኀሠዩ፡ እስመ፡ አዕበየ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ከከመ፡ ይገበር።

translations.lxx: Be of good courage, O land; rejoice and be glad: for the Lord has done great things.
translations.kjv: Fear not, O land; be glad and rejoice: for the LORD will do great things.

verses.geez: ተአመኑ፡ እንስሳ፡ ገዳም፡ እስመ፡ ብዕላ፡ አሕቃላተ፡ በድው፡ ወፈርየ፡ ዕፅ፡ ወወይን፡ ወበለስ፡ ዋሀቡ፡ ኃይሎሙ።

translations.lxx: Be of good courage, ye beasts of the plain, for the plains of the wilderness have budded, for the trees have borne their fruit, the fig-tree and the vine have yielded their strength.
translations.kjv: Be not afraid, ye beasts of the field: for the pastures of the wilderness do spring, for the tree beareth her fruit, the fig tree and the vine do yield their strength.

verses.geez: ተፈስሑ፡ ወተኀሠዩ፡ በእግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክክሙ፡ ደቂቀ፡ ጽዩን፡ እስመ፡ ወሀበክሙ፡ ሲሳየ፡ ጽድቅ፡ ወያዘንመ፡ ላክሙ፡ ጸደየ፡ ወመጸወ፡ ከመ፡ ትካት።

translations.lxx: Rejoice then and be glad, ye children of Sion, in the Lord your God: for he has given you food fully, and he will rain on you the early and the latter rain, as before.
translations.kjv: Be glad then, ye children of Zion, and rejoice in the LORD your God: for he hath given you the former rain moderately, and he will cause to come down for you the rain, the former rain, and the latter rain in the first month.

verses.geez: ወይመልዕ፡ ዐውደ፡ እክል፡ ወይትከዐው፡ ምክያደ፡ ወይን፡ ወዘይት።

translations.lxx: And the floors shall be filled with corn, and the presses shall overflow with wine and oil.
translations.kjv: And the floors shall be full of wheat, and the vats shall overflow with wine and oil.

verses.geez: ወእፈድየክሙ፡ ህየንተ፡ ዓመት፡ ዘበልዓ፡ አንበጣ፡ ወዕፄ፡ ወዳጎብያ፡ ወአናኲዕ፡ ኃይልየ፡ ዘፈነውኩ፡ ላዕሌክሙ።

translations.lxx: And I will recompense you for the years which the locust, and the caterpillar, and the palmerworm, and the cankerworm have eaten, even my great army, which I sent against you.
translations.kjv: And I will restore to you the years that the locust hath eaten, the cankerworm, and the caterpiller, and the palmerworm, my great army which I sent among you.

verses.geez: ወተሴሰዩ፡ ወብልዑ፡ ወጽገቡ፡ ወሰበሑ፡ ስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክነ፡ ስመ፡ ገብረ፡ ለክሙ፡ መንክረ፡ ወኢይትኀፈሩ፡ እንከ፡ ሕዝብየ፡ ለዓለም።

translations.lxx: And ye shall eat abundantly, and be satisfied, and shall praise the name of the Lord your God for the things which he has wrought wonderfully with you: and my people shall not be ashamed for ever.
translations.kjv: And ye shall eat in plenty, and be satisfied, and praise the name of the LORD your God, that hath dealt wondrously with you: and my people shall never be ashamed.

verses.geez: ወተአምሩ፡ እከ፡ ከመከ፡ ሀሎኩ፡ አነ፡ ማእከለ፡ እስራኤል፡ ወአነ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክክሙ፡ ወአልቦ፡ ባዕደ፡ ዘእንቤለየ፡ ወኢይትኀፈሩ፡ እንከ፡ ሕዝብየ፡ ለዓለም።

translations.lxx: And ye shall know that I am in the midst of Israel, and that I am the Lord your God, and that there is none else beside me; and my people shall no more be ashamed for ever.
translations.kjv: And ye shall know that I am in the midst of Israel, and that I am the LORD your God, and none else: and my people shall never be ashamed.

verses.geez: ወእምድኅረ፡ ዝንቱ፡ አክዑ፡ እምነ፡ መንፈስየ፡ ላዕለከ፡ ኲሉ፡ ዘስጋ፡ ወይትኔበዩ፡ ደቂቅክሙ፡ ወአዋድክሙ፡ ወሊቃውንቲክሙኒ፡ ሕልመ፡ የሐለወሙ፡ ወወራሲትክሙ፡ ራእየ፡ ይሬእዩ።

translations.kjv: And it shall come to pass afterward, that I will pour out my spirit upon all flesh; and your sons and your daughters shall prophesy, your old men shall dream dreams, your young men shall see visions:

verses.geez: ወላዕለ፡ አግብርትየ፡ ወላዕለ፡ አእማትየ፡ ይእተ፡ አሚረ፡ እክኡ፡ እምነ፡ መንፈስየ።

translations.kjv: And also upon the servants and upon the handmaids in those days will I pour out my spirit.

verses.geez: ወእገብር፡ ተአምረ፡ በሰማይ፡ በላእሌ፡ ወበምድር፡ በታሕቱ፡ ደመ፡ ወእሳተ፡ ወተነ፡ ጢስ።

translations.kjv: And I will shew wonders in the heavens and in the earth, blood, and fire, and pillars of smoke.

verses.geez: ፀሐይኒ፡ ይጸልም፡ ወወርኅኒ፡ ደመ፡ ይከውን፡ ዝንበለ፡ ትብጻሕ፡ ዕለተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ዓባይ፡ እንተ፡ ታስተርኢ።

translations.kjv: The sun shall be turned into darkness, and the moon into blood, before the great and the terrible day of the LORD come.

verses.geez: ወኲሉ፡ ዘጸውዐ፡ ህቋ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ይድኅን። እስመ፡ በውስተ፡ ደብረ፡ ጽዩን፡ ወኢየሩሳሌም፡ ይድኅኑ፡ በከመ፡ ይቤ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ውለ፡ ይሜህሩ፡ እለ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ጸውዖሙ።

translations.kjv: And it shall come to pass, that whosoever shall call on the name of the LORD shall be delivered: for in mount Zion and in Jerusalem shall be deliverance, as the LORD hath said, and in the remnant whom the LORD shall call.

note: The outpouring of the Spirit: 'Your sons and your daughters shall prophesy, your old men shall dream dreams.' Quoted by Peter at Pentecost (Acts 2). The Ethiopian church sees Pentecost as the fulfillment of Joel's prophecy for all nations.
